subject: Swift Trigger 1186386 is not a GRB
body:
B. Sbarufatti (INAF-OAB) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift BAT triggers 1186386 at 14:52:00 UT on 2023-08-21, is due to
misidentification of a known source during a Star Tracker
Loss-of-Lock. It is not  an astrophysical event.
